# Tell us about the skills that make you stand outThese questions areÉ*Created: Monday, October 27, 2025 at 8:31:37?PM*<div><b>Tell us about the skills that make you stand out</b>These questions are optional, but your answers help us make better job recommendations.<b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Which essential job skills have you commonly used in your work?</b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b>Corporate sales environment</b></div>

<div>1-10%</div>
<div>11-25%</div>
<div>26-50%</div>
<div>51-75%</div>
<div>More than 75%</div>
<div><b>What is the largest sale you have achieved in terms of revenue?</b></div>
<div>$1-$5,000</div>
<div>$5,000-$20,000</div>
<div>$20,000-$50,000</div>
<div>$50,000-$100,000</div>
<div>$100,000-$200,000</div>
<div>$200,000-$500,000</div>
<div>More than $500,000</div>
<div><b>What is your average sales lead-to-close time?</b></div>
<div>Less than 1 month</div>
<div>1-3 months</div>
<div>4-6 months</div>
<div>7-12 months</div>
<div>More than 12 months</div>
